name: Mobile Banking App Compromise
description: Attack tree modelling compromise of a mobile banking application through certificate pinning bypass, API manipulation, overlay attacks, and runtime hooking
root_objective: Compromise mobile banking app to conduct fraudulent transactions

nodes.title: Conduct Fraudulent Banking Transactions
nodes.description: Compromise the mobile banking app to initiate unauthorised transfers, steal credentials, or manipulate transaction data

nodes.title: Intercept API Communications
nodes.description: Capture and modify traffic between the mobile app and banking backend

nodes.title: Bypass Certificate Pinning
nodes.description: Use Frida or Objection to disable SSL certificate pinning and intercept HTTPS traffic

nodes.title: Modify Transaction Parameters
nodes.description: Alter amount, recipient account, or currency in API requests before they reach the server

nodes.title: Exploit Client-Side Vulnerabilities
nodes.description: Attack the mobile app runtime to extract secrets or manipulate behaviour

nodes.title: Hook Runtime with Frida
nodes.description: Use dynamic instrumentation to bypass authentication checks, extract encryption keys, or modify app logic at runtime

nodes.title: Extract Hardcoded API Keys
nodes.description: Decompile the APK/IPA and extract hardcoded API keys, encryption keys, or backend URLs

nodes.title: Credential Theft via Overlay
nodes.description: Steal user credentials through screen overlay or accessibility service attacks

nodes.title: Deploy Banking Trojan Overlay
nodes.description: Install malware that displays a fake login overlay on top of the real banking app to capture credentials

nodes.title: Abuse Accessibility Service
nodes.description: Use Android accessibility services to read screen content, capture OTPs, and automate transactions

nodes.title: Bypass Server-Side Controls
nodes.description: Circumvent backend security controls protecting transaction integrity

nodes.title: Replay Transaction Tokens
nodes.description: Capture and replay OTP or transaction signing tokens within their validity window

nodes.title: Exploit Rate Limiting Gaps
nodes.description: Bypass transaction rate limits by manipulating device identifiers or session tokens
